summary: feat(security-events): Add passkey security event names
description:
Add 5 passkey security event names to EVENT_NAMES registry and create DB migration to insert them into securityEventNames table.

Events:
- account.passkey.registration_success
- account.passkey.registration_failure
- account.passkey.removed
- account.passkey.authentication_success
- account.passkey.authentication_failure
